title: How to build a custom vision agent
summary: John Capobianco demonstrates how to build a custom vision agent using Google Gemini and the Model Context Protocol (MCP). The agent captures live webcam images with Nano Banana Pro hardware and animates them using Veo 3, while processing natural language prompts and real-time ASL conversations.
writeup: John Capobianco builds a custom vision agent on Google Cloud Tech using Google Gemini and the Model Context Protocol (MCP). The agent captures live webcam images with Nano Banana Pro hardware and animates them with Veo 3, while handling natural language prompts and real-time ASL conversations. The demonstration ties together computer vision, a natural language interface, and MCP as the connective layer for agent tooling.
